data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Ensures secure transmission of data between the server and users.
data.technical_spec: Implemented with up-to-date TLS protocols and certificates.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Protects the site from Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Azure DDoS protection services for security.

data.title: Web Application Firewall
data.description: Provides a firewall to block malicious traffic.
data.technical_spec: Powered by Azure Web Application Firewall rules.

data.title: Periodic Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security audits to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Employs Microsoft Security Assessment and Testing tools.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Controls access using secure identity management practices.
data.technical_spec: Integrated with Azure Active Directory for secure sign-ins.
